brand.name: Gui Lin Shan Ju
brand.taglineEn: A mountain sanctuary in the clouds of Pu'er

home.heroTitle:
Return to the forest.
Return to yourself.
home.heroSubtitle: Tucked into the cloud forests of Pu'er, Yunnan, a mountain home designed for stillness.
home.introBody: Set among the ancient tea mountains of Pu'er, Gui Lin Shan Ju is three small lodges with six rooms, built on the philosophy of living with the forest. No televisions. No noise. Just wind, birdsong, and a cup of warm pu'er.
home.roomsTitle:
Three lodges.
Every room a view.
home.roomsSubtitle: Built with local timber and handwoven textiles, floor-to-ceiling windows bring the forest indoors.
home.experiencesSubtitle: Morning meditation, afternoon tea ceremony, evening stargazing — a full day of returning.
home.ctaSubtitle: We host only six rooms. Book 14 days ahead to secure your mountain time.

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Six rooms across three lodges, each with its own forest view.

suite.name: Mountain View Suite
suite.shortDesc: 270° glass wall, wake to sea of clouds
suite.longDesc: On the second floor of the main lodge, the entire glass wall draws the valley's sea of clouds indoors. Private tea room, hinoki wood bathtub, skylight for stargazing from bed.

double.name: Forest View King
double.longDesc: Step out of your room into a private tea garden. Floor-to-ceiling glass faces a hundred-year-old tree; afternoon sun filters through leaves onto the bed.

twin.name: Forest Twin
twin.longDesc: Two 1.2m single beds, ideal for friends traveling together or parent-child stays. Outside the window: a dense cedar forest, especially beautiful in the rain.

experiences.title: Mountain Experiences
experiences.subtitle: From morning to midnight, a complete day of returning to the forest.

meditation.title: Morning Meditation
meditation.desc: On the main terrace facing the sea of clouds, 60 minutes of mindful breath with a teacher.

tea.title: Ancient Tree Tea Ceremony
tea.desc: Afternoon visit to a thousand-year-old tea garden — pick, press, brew with a local tea master.

forest.title: Forest Bathing
forest.desc: A 3km gentle walk through old-growth forest with a trained guide, awakening the five senses.

stargazing.title: Stargazing at Night
stargazing.desc: 1,580m altitude, zero light pollution. Hot drinks and wool blankets provided.

mushroom.title: Wild Mushroom Foraging
mushroom.desc: June to September, the rainy season. Follow villagers into the hills for matsutake, termitomyces, porcini.

workshop.title: Mountain Craft Workshop
workshop.desc: Indigo dyeing, pottery, pressed flowers — bring the colors of the forest home with you.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Daily life at Gui Lin — mountain, cloud, light, people.

about.title: About Gui Lin
about.subtitle: A mountain home for the body and mind to restart.

story.title:
We wanted to build a place
where you can do nothing at all.
story.body:
The founders of Gui Lin Shan Ju are three friends exhausted by the city. In 2021, they found this land in the deep mountains of Lancang County, Pu'er — 1,580m altitude, 92% forest coverage, the nearest village five kilometers away.

Over three years, they designed and built the lodges with their own hands, using local timber, traditional rammed-earth techniques, and solar power. In spring 2024, Gui Lin opened its doors.

items.title: Living with the forest
items.body: No trees cut, no earth dug. Every structure follows the mountain's contours, preserving the original land.

items.title: Local is luxury
items.body: Ingredients from within 30km. Workers from nearby villages. Crafts inherited from ethnic minority traditions.

items.title: Slowness is the deepest hospitality
items.body: No check-in clock. No mini-bar pitches. No lobby announcements. Just you and the mountain.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We're here, listening to your plans to return.
contact.addressValue: Yunshan Forest, Huimin Town, Lancang County, Pu'er, Yunnan, China

book.title: Book Your Stay
book.name: Name
book.success: We'll confirm via phone or email within 24 hours.
